detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Private_Bank.CashOut(uint256) (Private_Bank.sol#53-75):
	External calls:
	- msg.sender.call.value(_am)() (Private_Bank.sol#63)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- balances[msg.sender] -= _am (Private_Bank.sol#67)
	Private_Bank.balances (Private_Bank.sol#9) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Private_Bank.CashOut(uint256) (Private_Bank.sol#53-75)
	- Private_Bank.Deposit() (Private_Bank.sol#31-49)
	- Private_Bank.balances (Private_Bank.sol#9)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [Private_Bank.CashOut(uint256)](Private_Bank.sol#L53-L75):
	External calls:
	- [msg.sender.call.value(_am)()](Private_Bank.sol#L63)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [balances[msg.sender] -= _am](Private_Bank.sol#L67)
	[Private_Bank.balances](Private_Bank.sol#L9) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [Private_Bank.CashOut(uint256)](Private_Bank.sol#L53-L75)
	- [Private_Bank.Deposit()](Private_Bank.sol#L31-L49)
	- [Private_Bank.balances](Private_Bank.sol#L9)
